nodes.name: 🔔 Webhook — Trigger Content Engine
nodes.notes: Called by Workflow 03 after product goes live. Receives: product_id, title, description, category, store_urls, product_images, brand_id, keywords.

parameters.jsCode:
const product = $('⚙️ Merge Brand + Product').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...product, halal_approved: true } }];

values.content: You are an expert SEO content writer. You write long-form blog posts that rank on Google AND convert readers into buyers. You write in a natural, human voice — direct, specific, zero fluff. You understand on-page SEO: keyword placement, heading hierarchy, featured snippet optimization via FAQ sections, and internal linking strategy. Respond in valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🧠 llama3 — Write SEO Blog Post
nodes.notes: Writes complete 1800-2200 word SEO post. ~5-10 min on CPU VPS. Includes proper HTML structure, keyword placement, FAQ section for featured snippets, 2 product CTAs.

values.content: You are an expert social media carousel designer and conversion copywriter. You create scroll-stopping carousels that educate, build trust, and drive sales without feeling like ads. You know that great carousels tell a story across slides — each slide earns the swipe to the next. Respond in valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🧠 mistral — Script 3 Carousels
nodes.notes: Scripts 3 carousel types × 6-8 slides. Higher temp for creative, engaging copy. mistral handles structured multi-format output better than llama3 for this task.

nodes.name: 🖥️ Build Slide HTML (1080×1080)
nodes.notes: Builds professional 1080x1080px slide HTML. Brand bar, slide counter, logo watermark, CTA on last slide. Renders cleanly via wkhtmltoimage.

nodes.name: 💻 Render Slides → PNG
nodes.notes: Renders each slide as 1080x1080 PNG. Uses wkhtmltoimage — already installed from vps_setup.sh. Runs all slides for this carousel.

nodes.name: 📝 WordPress — Create Draft Post
nodes.notes: SETUP: (1) Install WordPress on VPS. (2) WP Admin > Users > Profile > Application Passwords — generate one. (3) Base64 encode 'username:app_password'. (4) Replace YOUR_WP_BASE64_AUTH. Posts as DRAFT — you review and publish manually, or change status to 'publish' for full auto.

nodes.name: 🔍 Ping Google Sitemap
nodes.notes: Fetches sitemap to trigger Google re-crawl. Also submit manually to Google Search Console once blog is live.

nodes.name: 📌 Pinterest — Pin → Blog Post
nodes.notes: Creates Pinterest pin linking to blog post. This is the core Pinterest→Blog→Store traffic loop. Pinterest amplifies blog content reach massively.

value.Notes: Blog draft ready for review. Change WP status to publish when approved.

meta.description: Workflow 09A: Content Engine — Blog + Carousel. Two parallel pipelines: (1) Blog — llama3 writes 1800-2200 word SEO post → WF05 humanizes → WordPress draft → Pinterest pin linking to blog → sitemap ping. (2) Carousel — mistral scripts 3 types × 6-8 slides → HTML rendered as 1080x1080 PNGs via wkhtmltoimage → posted to Instagram, Facebook, Pinterest. All content halal-checked via WF07, brand-configured via WF06. Logs to Content_Calendar sheet.
